title: Ethical create and stuff
description: Ethical Create and stuff is a small modpack meant to be able to be run on lower end pcs while still getting the full experience of the create mod and other smaller additions.
body:
Ethical Create and stuff is a small modpack meant to be able to be run on lower end pcs while still getting the full experience of the create mod and other smaller additions. 

This modpack includes many mods that are similar to the vanilla experience, but vary enough to add some extra reason and variety to play more. 

It includes the tech mod create, which you can use to create moving contraptions that you could only dream of building with vanilla redstone, while still feeling close to the vanilla game. 

Other features included are gorgeous biomes to explore and many blocks that can be used by builders to unlock their full potentials. 

With this pack you’ll be able to expand your creativity past the vanilla experience while not feeling like a whole different game. 

It also includes performance mods so that everyone can get in on the fun, no matter the pc.
